evidence_extract: Article text states that mayor David Klobasa announced an AI-assisted municipal-secretariat phone agent named Klara that answers naturally, recognizes call content, and routes callers to the competent office; the article also says the municipality presents itself as among the first in Slovenia to use such a solution in daily municipal administration.
paper_thesis_use: Keeps the row usable as a bounded appendix/methods comparator while official corroboration stays unresolved.
caution: Use only as direct local-news support; do not restate as official municipal confirmation, production-performance proof, or staffing-replacement evidence.

evidence_extract: Browser access returned the Slovenian message that access from this IP address is temporarily disabled.
paper_thesis_use: Reviewer-safe negative-evidence row showing that the municipal official route is currently host-blocked at the entry page, not merely unresolved by missing keywords.
caution: This is host-state evidence only; it does not prove that the municipality lacks relevant public content.

evidence_extract: HTTP request returned status 403 with the same temporary-access-disabled error page.
paper_thesis_use: Adds machine-checkable blocker evidence that even the usual route-discipline/robots surface is unavailable from this host.
caution: A blocked robots surface is a host-access fact, not permission to bypass access controls.

evidence_extract: HTTP request returned status 404 for the default sitemap path.
paper_thesis_use: Shows no easy sitemap fallback was available on the tested canonical host path.
caution: A 404 on the default sitemap path does not prove the absence of other public index files on other paths.

evidence_extract: Both tested WordPress-style JSON endpoints returned 404.
paper_thesis_use: Documents that common machine-readable discovery shortcuts were not exposed on the tested official host, which strengthens the case for freezing this route until a genuinely different public municipal surface appears.
caution: Do not infer site technology or hidden endpoint absence beyond these exact tested paths.

evidence_extract: The Klara row remains a bounded direct non-official comparator, but the official-municipal blocker is now more explicit: entry-page IP block plus no default robots/sitemap/WP-JSON assist on the tested host paths.
paper_thesis_use: Useful for reviewer-response and thesis methods prose that explains why the package did one real official-surface retry and then stopped without overreading the local-news row.
caution: No publication bucket, evidence tier, or claim ceiling changed from this recheck alone.
